gitCommit.subject: fix: keep test suite green without a GoREST token (#17)
gitCommit.body:
fix: keep test suite green without a GoREST token (#17)

Make the GoREST token optional so a fresh `npm install && npm test` passes: the API fixture reads process.env directly instead of throwing via requireEnv(), and the CRUD test skips with a clear message when no token is set. Remove the now-dead tests/support/env.ts and realign the README and traceability matrix.

Also give local runs one retry (retries: CI ? 2 : 1) so a transient GoREST blip does not turn a fresh run red, and align @types/node with the Node 22 CI runtime.

subs.title: standard user can log in and land on inventory @smoke @ui @auth

user can add and remove an item from the cart @smoke @ui @cart

Click locator('[data-test="cart-list"] [data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove' })
user can complete checkout for selected products @smoke @ui @checkout
